_comment: Shipped default content for the DRINK STOP site admin panel. This file is the fallback source of truth until Supabase storage is wired in — at that point, loadContent()/saveContent() in content-loader.js should be swapped to read/write Supabase instead of localStorage, and this file's shape should map directly to your tables.

mangofunk.name: RUM FOR YOUR LIFE
mangofunk.subtitle: Rum, fruit punch & watermelon.
mangofunk.description: Sweet, loaded and dangerously easy. Frozen rum with a fruit-punch hit — the one you'll be running back for.

tropisamba.name: RUMBACLART 2.0
tropisamba.subtitle: Pineapple, apple & guava.
tropisamba.description: Tropical, smooth and unapologetic. The remix nobody asked for and everybody finished. Island energy, frozen.

rumbaclart1.name: RUMBACLART 1.0
rumbaclart1.subtitle: Rum, mango, passionfruit & orange.
rumbaclart1.description: The original troublemaker. Mango, passionfruit and ripe orange hauled into frozen rum before the remix was even a thought. Tropical, loud and first to the party.

summerset.name: SUMMER SET
summerset.subtitle: Rum, pineapple & coconut.
summerset.description: Sunshine in a pouch. Creamy coconut and sweet pineapple over ice-cold rum — bottled summer, no airport required. Sip slow and pretend you're seaside.

blutiful.name: BLUTIFUL
blutiful.subtitle: Rum, blue raspberry, apple & lemon.
blutiful.description: Pretty in blue. Sharp blue raspberry cut with crisp apple and lemon over frozen rum. Eye-catching, mouth-puckering and gone in seconds.

rumazing.name: RUMAZING
rumazing.subtitle: Rum, apple & mango.
rumazing.description: Unreal. Ripe mango and crisp apple smashed into frozen rum. Dangerously smooth, dangerously moreish — straight-up amazing.

greengroov.name: SUCK YOUR RUM
greengroov.subtitle: Rum, apple, lemon & ginger.
greengroov.description: Sharp, zingy and with a proper kick. Ginger heat meets ice-cold rum — sip slow, or don't.
